name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Your name is missing, Peter
body:
You're front and center in this campaign | Peter --

As the head of operations here at our Brooklyn headquarters, I give a lot of tours of the office to folks from all over the country, from local and state politicians to members of the press. There’s one place I always make absolutely sure they see: our Donor Wall.

All over this wall, in microscopic letters (to fit everyone in!), you can see the names of thousands of people who chipped in to support this campaign last summer, when we were just getting started. In person, it’s overwhelming in the best way -- seeing all those names lined up is one of the most tangible reminders of how strong we are together.

**[With just 11 weeks until Election Day, this is your chance to get your name up there, too! Chip in to join them and leave no doubt whatsoever that you’re on this team.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Spending a moment by the wall reminds me of who Hillary’s fighting for -- all of us, and our children, grandchildren, and their future children, too. And it also reminds me of what a big fight we’re a part of, powered by millions of people and requiring all hands on deck -- including yours.

Peter, we created the Donor Wall to affirm who’s front and center in this campaign: you. This is your campaign, and absolutely nothing in this organization -- this wall, these offices full of teams organizing battleground states, even the lights we flick on every day -- exists without you. We need you by our side, and never more so than in this final stretch. Without you, these lights don’t turn on, and under President Trump, the country goes dark.

**Chip in now if you’re with us:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Lizz

Lizz Gramling
Head of HQ Operations
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and have your name added to the official Donor Wall:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzMjAwMjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MTYwNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Paul Ryan
subject: The Hillary Effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,

I worry about what will happen if Hillary Clinton is elected president.

**Her scandals should disqualify her from ever holding a political office** \-- yet Democrats want to elect her to the highest office in the land.

Imagine the poisonous trickle-down effect it would have on our democracy if she is elected.

A Hillary Clinton win, in essence, would be granting her a **free pass for her illegal and corrupt behavior.**

The situation would be even worse if we fail to protect our House majority. Imagine how bad it would be if Hillary Clinton came into office with Speaker Nancy Pelosi...

And with only 76 days remaining until the election, we're at a serious disadvantage.

**Will you stand with me and make an emergency donation to fight back against Hillary Clinton and Nancy Pelosi?**

Or pitch in another amount via this secure link: [**https://secure.speakerryan.com/contribute-speaker-ryan/**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37179374:srN7K6bBN:m:1:1353064270:5A9F8DA8B2E2BF6C184A10073192E602:r)

America is counting on you to step up.

Sincerely,

Speaker Paul Ryan

For a limited time, I'm offering supporters the chance to meet me on the campaign trail for dinner.

name: Gwen Moore, RussFeingold.com
subject: I will not shut up
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Our voices matter. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf447d/1c469400/7396dcb/3573bd0/2047374005/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf447d/1c469400/7396dcb/3573bd0/2047374005/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")
---
"Fat."
"Pig."
"Dog."
"Disgusting animal."
These are all words Donald Trump has used to describe women. That's what he sees in our daughters, our mothers, and our sisters. That's how he sees women like me.
I see things very differently. You see things very differently. And I'm here to tell you that my friend, Russ Feingold, does, too. Russ has been fighting for and alongside women for his whole life. And while his opponent, Republican Senator Ron Johnson, supports Donald Trump's campaign, from day one Russ has spoken out against Trump's misogyny. Russ understands what a complete and total disaster a Donald Trump presidency would be for women in Wisconsin -- and across the country.
So this week, I am so proud to help launch **Women for Russ** : a coalition of women across Wisconsin and America who are working every day to send Russ to the Senate.
**[Will you join us as a founding member of Women for Russ? Add your name to get your FREE bumper sticker to show your support.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf447d/1c469400/7396dcb/3573bd0/2047374005/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")**
Wisconsin women aren't just fighting for respect and equality this election: We're fighting for the ability to control our own lives. We've had six years of Governor Scott Walker and Senator Johnson, and it's been devastating. They've restricted our access to health care, fought against pay equity, and taken away some of our most cherished freedoms. Yesterday was Black Women's Equal Pay Day. A day to remind all of us that, in 2016, black women still typically only make 60 cents for every dollar white men make. **_We can't afford one more day._**
We need Russ in the Senate, fighting right alongside Senator Tammy Baldwin for Wisconsin women. Instead of taking away our rights, Russ will work tirelessly to protect them. That's because he gets it. Unlike Senator Johnson and the party of Trump, Russ has been listening to women all along.
We have just 75 days left until Election Day. You know that I'm going to do everything I can to get out the vote for Russ, and Democrats up and down the ballot. But I can't do it alone. I need you to step up right now and join me.
**[Step up. Become a founding member of Women for Russ. Add your name, and get your FREE bumper sticker today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf447d/1c469400/7396dcb/3573bd0/2047374005/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/women-for-russ?utm_source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&source=ema_2016-08-24_women-for-russ_GM&utm_campaign=women-for-russ&utm_medium=ema")**
For too long women have been told to sit down and shut up. But I never will. Because our voices matter. I will not shut up, and I won't stand idly this election. I'm going to fight like hell.
Thank you for fighting with me.
Gwen Moore

body: Peter, I worry about what will happen if Hillary Clinton is elected president. Her scandals should disqualify her from ever holding a political office -- yet Democrats want to elect her to the highest office in the land. Imagine the poisonous trickle-down effect it would have on our democracy if she is elected. A Hillary Clinton win, in essence, would be granting her a free pass for her illegal and corrupt behavior. The situation would be even worse if we fail to protect our House majority. Imagine how bad it would be if Hillary Clinton came into office with Speaker Nancy Pelosi... **We're coming up on our make-or-break pre-primary FEC deadline -- the biggest of the campaign so far -- and the latest poll shows our lead has evaporated.**
Right-wing groups, including ones tied to the Koch Brothers, Mitch McConnell, and Karl Rove, have spent $24 million against Governor Maggie Hassan. And with this recent dip in the polls, it looks like they're going to spend even more to try to take the lead.
**Grassroots supporters like you are our best shot at bouncing back in the fight to elect Maggie and take back the Senate.**[Please, give $3 or whatever makes sense for you so that together, we can hit our $75,000 goal by Wednesday's pre-primary fundraising deadline.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7f2/2a380d31/11d96749/fa50d2/3622761811/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODI0XzA4MjFQUEQxLUtpY2tfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160824_0821PPD1-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")****
Poll after poll shows Maggie locked in a dead heat with Trump's endorsed candidate, Kelly Ayotte. That's why we need you to step up right now and help us hit our goal before this critical FEC deadline. With the election a few months away, are you ready to get out the vote?

The Leadership Institute is hosting a [Get-Out-The-Vote Workshop in Falls Church](http://leadershipinstitute.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ade33ad2ac518b984f85d844c&id=7a091ae7a2&e=cd7b396b57), Virginia on August 30. The cost of the training is FREE.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Expanding opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Provide every child with a level playing field.

Dear Friend,

It's that time of year!

All across our state, dedicated, hardworking educators and administrators are opening their classroom doors for the start of a new school year -- this time of year always fills me with a sense of hope and possibility. Education has the power to transform lives.

With more than one million Washington children heading to school, it is an exciting time. A world of opportunity and possibilities emerge as each classroom door opens.

That's why it is vital to stay focused on boosting education from early learning and pre-K all the way through college graduation. We must not shortchange our children and young people in these critical years.

As governor, strengthening education is my priority. If it's your priority, too, add your name to show your support for our work here in Washington.

LINK: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTQwNDA2NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgxOTM1NTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0

Expanding early learning opportunities for hardworking families. Reducing class sizes. Paying good salaries to great educators. Making college affordable for every student. Providing exceptional learning opportunities for all our children, no matter where they live. That's been my mission as governor and that's what I'll keep fighting for in my next term.

>From historic investments in pre-K to cuts in tuition for both two-year and four-year college students, there's a lot for us to be proud of. And there is still a lot to accomplish. We cannot ease up on our efforts to make Washington a leader in education.

Kids are headed back to school -- it's time to reaffirm that education is a major priority for us in Washington state. If you agree, will you add your name today?

LINK: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTQwNDA2NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgxOTM1NTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0

That's why I'm running for governor. I want to provide every child with a level playing field as they walk into their classroom this year -- and in the years to come.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

SIGN ON: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTQwNDA2NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgxOTM1NTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0

Friend -- Please join us this Friday for an important campaign workshop. As we expand our voter contact efforts for the fall it is important everyone is ready to share Bill's message and vision for Washington, so please come by Friday evening for this crucial event to help bring real leadership to Washington. _Who should come?_ Precinct Committee Officers, Campaign Managers and staff, community members, volunteers, and neighborhood leaders interested in helping to bring real change to Washington.

_What are we covering?_ Effective door knocking, messaging and logistics, organizing volunteer efforts, and tips on how to energize your base. We'll dive into the key tools and techniques you can use and teach others to help Bill win this election.

_When is it?_ Friday, August 26th from 7:00PM to 9:00PM

_Where is it?_ 2724 Sixth Avenue South, Seattle, WA 98134

Please put this important event on your calendar and let me know if you have any questions. Thank you!

Ryan Hatcher
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

name: Barack Obama
subject: Add your name to be a volunteer
body:
Hillary is the only person I trust to continue this mission | Peter, in the most difficult moments of the past eight years, you’ve carried me.

Through two tough campaigns, through battles for health care, Supreme Court appointments, and so much more, you’ve never wavered. You believed we could change this country for the better, so you picked up the phone, hit the streets, and used the internet in amazing new ways to make change happen. You are the best organizers on the planet, and I’m so proud of all the change you’ve made possible.

When I talk about the audacity of hope, I’m talking about you, Peter. And today, I’m asking you to step up and carry Hillary across the finish line of this race and into the White House.

**[The campaign's set a goal of getting 50,000 people to sign up to volunteer -- just today! Will you add your name to say you’ll be one of them?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzMjgxMDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MzAxNzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

As my presidency draws to a close, I’m looking ahead to all the work we have to do in the years to come. We have to expand the Affordable Care Act so all Americans are finally covered. We need to raise wages for the middle class and make college a reality for all kids. We need to expand rights for people of all genders, faiths, races, backgrounds, and those who identify as LGBT so we can finally say that this is a nation where we are truly equal -- not just in how we’re born, but in how we live.

Hillary is the only person I trust to continue this mission, and you’re the team I trust to make sure she wins the job. I’m looking forward to doing my part to help her win this election. Today, I’m asking you to join me -- to reject cynicism, reject fear, to summon what’s best in us; to elect Hillary Clinton as the next President of the United States, and show the world we still believe in the promise of this great nation.

**Add your name right now to say you’ll volunteer and be part of it -- we’re counting on you, Peter:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzMjgxMDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MzAxNzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Barack

|
**We need to connect with every voter if we’re going to put Hillary in the White House. If you can't give your time, chip in $1 to help us invest in our ground game:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzMjgxMDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0MzAxNzIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

clean_body: Hillary is the only person I trust to continue this mission | Peter, in the most difficult moments of the past eight years, you’ve carried me. Through two tough campaigns, through battles for health care, Supreme Court appointments, and so much more, you’ve never wavered. You believed we could change this country for the better, so you picked up the phone, hit the streets, and used the internet in amazing new ways to make change happen. You are the best organizers on the planet, and I’m so proud of all the change you’ve made possible. When I talk about the audacity of hope, I’m talking about you, Peter. And today, I’m asking you to step up and carry Hillary across the finish line of this race and into the White House. As my presidency draws to a close, I’m looking ahead to all the work we have to do in the years to come. We have to expand the Affordable Care Act so all Americans are finally covered. We need to raise wages for the middle class and make college a reality for all kids. We need to expand rights for people of all genders, faiths, races, backgrounds, and those who identify as LGBT so we can finally say that this is a nation where we are truly equal -- not just in how we’re born, but in how we live. Hillary is the only person I trust to continue this mission, and you’re the team I trust to make sure she wins the job. I’m looking forward to doing my part to help her win this election. Today, I’m asking you to join me -- to reject cynicism, reject fear, to summon what’s best in us; to elect Hillary Clinton as the next President of the United States, and show the world we still believe in the promise of this great nation. Add your name right now to say you’ll volunteer and be part of it -- we’re counting on you, Peter: Thanks, Barack | We need to connect with every voter if we’re going to put Hillary in the White House. If you can't give your time, chip in $1 to help us invest in our ground game: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). name: Rob Portman
subject: Update from the RV
body:
| Peter, I just left a Small Business Roundtable at Gregory Industries in Canton as part of our 50-stop "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV Tour. Now we're off to Summit County!

We've had Senator Shelley Moore Capito on the RV with us all day and we started our morning in Bergholz touring a coal mine. It was great to hear from Ohio's coal workers and I'm honored to be endorsed by the United Mine Workers of America!

At our Small Business Roundtable at Gregory Industries, we talked about the burdensome regulations our small businesses are facing. [You can click here to watch how I stepped in and protected Ohio jobs](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DXYwhwz0XWA0&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rv_update&n=1) when Gregory Industries was facing harmful legislation in Washington.

Earlier this week, the Ohio Farm Bureau announced their support of our campaign. We've had an incredible month so far, and we now have the support of the Teamsters, the IUOE Local 18, the Fraternal Order of Police, the United Mine Workers of America, and the Ohio Farm Bureau.

We won't be outworked. Our incredible volunteers have contacted more than 3.3 million voters since May of last year -- and we are going to work even harder from now until Election Day!

Thank you for your support. We hope to see you soon on our RV Tour! All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rv_update&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rv_update&n=3)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rv_update&n=4)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rv_update&n=5). -=-=-
